title: stevia lucida var. lucida
intro: Stevia lucida var. lucida is a perennial shrub native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae), and is a variant of the Stevia lucida species. The medicinal properties of Stevia lucida var. lucida include its ability to inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi, making it useful in the treatment of various infections. The health benefits associated with Stevia lucida var. lucida include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Stevia lucida var. lucida can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used as a sweetener in its natural form due to its sweetness-enhancing compounds, steviol and stevioside.
